data.title: BTC currently faces a key support level at $84K, signaling a shift to a bear market after its profit cycle turned negative for the first time since 2023.
data.description: Bitcoin's profitability has dropped for the first time since 2023, indicating a shift towards a bear market.

data.title: The Gorman-Rupp Company declares $0.19 quarterly dividend, with 304 consecutive payments, and announces annual meeting.
data.description: In Mansfield, Ohio, The Gorman-Rupp Company (NYSE: GRC) board announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share on common shares, to be paid on March 10, 2026, to shareholders as of February 13, 2026. This marks the 304th consecutive quarterly dividend paid by the company. Additionally, the Board scheduled the Annual Meeting of Shareholders.

data.title: First Citizens BancShares, Inc. reported Q4 2025 earnings on Jan. 23, 2026. Chairman highlighted solid return metrics. (Total characters: 106)
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on January 23, 2026, First Citizens BancShares, Inc. (Nasdaq: FCNCA) released their earnings report for the fourth quarter of 2025. Chairman and CEO Frank B. Holding, Jr. highlighted the company's performance, stating they achieved strong return metrics during this period. The credit quality of the company also remained stable.

data.title: Transocean Ltd. to report Q4 2025 earnings on Feb. 19, 2026, after NYSE trading with fleet status. (Total characters: 100)
data.description: In Steinhauen, Switzerland, on January 23, 2026, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) disclosed its plans to disclose financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and share a fleet status update on February 19, 2026. The information will be released after the closure of trading on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: First Citizens BancShares, Inc. declares dividends on common and preferred stock, payable on March 16, 2026.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, First Citizens BancShares, Inc. (Nasdaq: FCNCA) announced dividend declarations for their common and preferred stock. The dividends are scheduled to be paid on March 16, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of February 27, 2026. This decision was made by the company's Board of Directors based in Raleigh, North Carolina.

data.title: Fourth Quarter Earnings Conference Call for Essent Group Ltd. set for February 13, 2026.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the global carbon emissions reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2020. This is an alarming increase of 2.4 billion metric tons compared to the previous year. The rise in emissions was largely attributed to the rebound in economic activities post the COVID-19 lockdowns. The data also showed that China was the largest emitter with 10.14 billion metric tons, followed by the United States with 5.41 billion metric tons and India with 3.17 billion metric tons. The report emphasized the urgent need for countries to implement effective climate change mitigation strategies to combat this concerning trend.

data.title: After takeover by Neynar, Farcaster will refund $180M to investors, continues to operate as a decentralized social network.
data.description: The decentralized social network Farcaster continues to operate following its acquisition by Neynar. The company has confirmed its intention to give back $180 million to investors.

data.title: Huawei Cloud reveals global sales partner policies for 2026, aiming for shared success in AI era.
data.description: In Singapore on January 22, 2026, the Huawei Cloud Global Sales Partner Policy Launch event was held with the theme "Shared Intelligence, Shared Success." The keynote speaker, Charles Yang, who serves as the Senior Vice President of Huawei and President of Huawei Cloud Global Marketing and Sales, addressed the attendees.

data.title: Singapore Airshow 2026 at Changi Exhibition Centre from 3–8 Feb will include 8 aerial displays by 6 air forces and 2 manufacturers.
data.description: Singapore Airshow 2026 is scheduled to take place at the Changi Exhibition Centre between February 3 and February 8. The event will include a total of eight aerial displays performed by six air forces and two commercial aircraft manufacturers. Attendees can look forward to witnessing a thrilling showcase of aerobatics and various aerial demonstrations during the event.

data.description: Telefonaktiebolaget L M (NASDAQ: ERIC) is expected to announce earnings of $0.23 per share with revenue totaling $7.03 billion. Meanwhile, SLB (NYSE: SLB) is projected to report earnings of $0.74 per share. For more details, visit the full article on a financial news website.

data.title: Melar Acquisition Corp. I and Everli Global Inc. submit Form S-4 for proposed business combination.
data.description: New York and Milan - Melar Acquisition Corp. I (NASDAQ: MACI) and Everli Global Inc. have revealed a significant development. Melar, a publicly traded special purpose acquisition company, and Everli, a leading e-grocery platform in Italy, have announced that Melar has confidentially submitted a draft registration statement on Form S-4 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This submission is part of the planned business combination between Melar and Everli, termed the "Proposed Transaction." This move marks a pivotal step in the strategic partnership between the two entities.
In Abu Dhabi, tripartite negotiations between Russia, the United States, and Ukraine have begun, according to Sky News.

data.title: CTOs are key in driving sustainability efforts, with 95% actively involved. 84% of businesses integrate sustainability in R&D but only 38% in standard decision-making. Data availability challenges AI adoption.
data.description: More than 95% of Chief Technology Officers (CTOs) are actively involved in promoting sustainability initiatives within their organizations. A study found that 84% of businesses prioritize sustainability in their research and development (R&D) decisions. Surprisingly, only 38% of companies have integrated sustainability into their standard decision-making processes. Despite the significance of artificial intelligence (AI) in advancing sustainability efforts, 38% of CTOs state that challenges related to data availability hinder progress in this area.

data.title: transcosmos partners with Chinese lingerie brand LING LINGERIE for entry into Japan, targeting Gen Z market.
data.description: transcosmos unveiled a recent collaboration with LING LINGERIE, a prominent Chinese luxury lingerie brand catering to Gen Z preferences, aimed at enhancing brand visibility. The strategic alliance will assist LING LINGERIE in amplifying its reach and securing a stronger foothold in the market. With this partnership, transcosmos aims to augment brand awareness and recognition for the flourishing Chinese lingerie brand.
